label: Us Shareholder Yield
description: High-shareholder-yield tilt, proxied as FF Mkt+0.5×HML (high book-to-market ≈ high-dividend cohort). Monthly, 5bps/side. True div12m_me per-stock construction pending real data (todo proxy log).
reference: Boudoukh, Michaely, Richardson & Roberts (2007), 'On the Importance of Measuring Payout Yield'
